description: A careful selection of the best challenges this year.
Challenges so easy a baby could solve them. Trust me, they're really really easy. But don't blame me if they aren't.

These challenges challenges aren't trivial but solvable with little experience (i.e. Introduction) and dedication.
A set of challenges handcrafted for CTF Beginners. With these (and only these) challenges, discussion and help is encouraged when you're stuck. Have fun!
